speaker: seller

args.message: Hey there! You've got a great eye — this 2016 Tahoe LT is an absolute gem. Full leather interior, Bose premium audio, runs like a dream, and it's been dealer-maintained its whole life. For a family rig that can handle anything you throw at it, this is steal at $24,900. Want to take it for a spin?

args.message: Could you tell me if this Tahoe has been in any accidents or had any major repairs?

text: Could you tell me if this Tahoe has been in any accidents or had any major repairs?

speaker: seller

args.message: Great question — and I really appreciate a buyer who does their homework. This Tahoe has a completely clean history. No accidents, no structural damage. As for major repairs, nope — this has been dealer-serviced from day one, so we've only done routine maintenance. The 5.3L V8 is rock-solid, and everything on this truck checks out. You could've bought this new and it wouldn't be more solid than it is right now.

args.message: What is the recent service history like? When was the last oil change or any other significant maintenance performed?

text: What is the recent service history like? When was the last oil change or any other significant maintenance performed?

speaker: seller

args.message: Excellent question. This vehicle has been meticulously maintained — all dealer service records are available. The last oil change was done about two months ago, and we do full synthetic every 7,500 miles on these. Transmission fluid was serviced recently as well, coolant system is fresh, and all filters are new. I can pull up the complete service records for you to review — everything's documented. This Tahoe has never been neglected, and you can tell by how it drives.

speaker: seller

args.message: I appreciate the offer, I really do — but $24,000 is a bit light for what we've got here. Look, this Tahoe is in exceptional condition with full service records and that premium Bose system. I saw this exact model go for $24,800 at auction just last week with higher mileage. How about we meet at $24,500? That's a fair split, and you'll be driving home in a bulletproof family hauler today.
